description_long: This house features a steep, dark gray hip roof with a prominent central chimney and a green exterior with a subtle, mottled texture. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by slender columns, a single main door, and two vertically oriented windows above. The side of the house displays a bay window with a small roof, while the rear has a simple, flat wall with minimal openings. The structure is accented with blue trim around the windows, doors, and roof edges, giving it a distinctive, slightly whimsical appearance. The house appears to be constructed primarily from wood, with shingled roofing and glass windows. Its overall form is compact and boxy, with a clear two-story layout and modest decorative detailing.
description: A compact, two-story green house with a steep hip roof, blue trim, and a covered front porch. Features include a central chimney, bay window, and vertically arranged windows.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the plain green wall, the large roof, and the central chimney.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the covered porch, main entry door, two upper windows, and garage-style side extension.
description_view_2: Side view featuring a bay window with a small roof and the continuation of the porch.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the porch roof, side extension, and upper windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with vertical strips and a bay window
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with slender columns, single main door, and a small overhang
